nodes.label: Unit tests for the UCS embody_role data types, invariants, and feature flags.
Each RoleContext instance must have independent lists.
Simulate the ACID lifecycle: stage → invariants pass → commit.
Simulate the ACID lifecycle: stage → invariants fail → rollback.
pending_ledger_entries must be cleared at start of each embodiment.
temperature_override=0.0 must NOT fall through to base temperature.
Effective temp with rupture should cap at 0.95.
Blind mode: Musa-class role sees NO tombstones.
